summary: Bay Area parcel-level general plan and zoning data from 2018, linking parcel IDs to land use classifications and planning grid references.
Geographic data for Bay Area express toll lanes as of 2019, including routes, status, and RTP project IDs.
Centroid coordinates for 109 San Francisco Bay Area jurisdictions from 2020 TIGER data, with county and jurisdiction names.
Cadastral parcel boundaries for Alameda County with assessed values, land use codes, mailing addresses, and document dates.
Draft regional land use designations for Bay Area parcels in 2019, including general plan codes, zoning descriptions, and density parameters.
Bay Area Vital Signs factoids with titles, highlights, and indicator blurbs for communicating regional trends.
RHNA (Regional Housing Needs Allocation) draft methodology factors for 2019, covering jobs-housing fit, transit access, equity, and natural hazard metrics by jurisdiction.
Jurisdiction parcel editor assignments for the BASIS land use database, listing Bay Area jurisdictions by population and assigned editor.
Housing and Land Use Viewer production dataset for Bay Area parcels with land value, improvement ratio, flood zone, seismic, and liquefaction risk flags.
Potential land use test dataset for Bay Area parcels with general plan and zoning codes, max residential density, and FAR.
Regional land use lookup table mapping regional descriptions to land use classes and display colors for Bay Area planning.
RHNA income distribution factors by jurisdiction and county for housing allocation planning.
2020 US apportionment data showing US House of Representatives seat counts, population change, and overseas population by state.
RHNA jurisdiction-level income shift distribution percentages for housing allocation across very low to moderate income categories.
Equity priority communities data for Bay Area using 2018 ACS, with race, disability, rent burden, limited English proficiency, and zero-vehicle household indicators by census tract.
Major rail station locations in the Bay Area with system name, mode, status, and route name.
County-level health and demographic indicators for Bay Area counties including premature death rates, rural percentage, broadband access, and racial composition.
Centroid points for 2010 census tracts in the San Francisco Bay region, clipped to remove coastal water areas.
Regional parcel grid with 8-mile tile boundaries for Bay Area planning, with page numbers and grid names.
Bay Area Vital Signs indicator target management data including goals, minimum and maximum values, and indicator paths for CMS.
City boundary polygons for Bay Area jurisdictions with district names and geographic identifiers.
Net worth ranges by 2019 census tracts in the Bay Area, showing distribution of household wealth from under $15,000 to higher brackets.
Regional jurisdiction boundary polygons for Bay Area counties and cities from the MTC GIS database.
Data source documentation for the Bay Area Housing and Land Use Viewer, mapping source datasets to viewer columns with descriptions.
Bay Area housing policy toolkit with policy categories, summaries, implementation guidance, and toolkit keys for jurisdictions.
Workflow request tracking log for the Bay Area Metro Data & Visualization team, listing project requests, priorities, and timeframes.
Wealth index by ZIP code for Bay Area with 2019 median net worth, age demographics, and population data.
Transportation Improvement Program (TIP) project line geometries for Bay Area with project names, TIP IDs, and PDA/COC designations.
Regional parcel grid with 2-mile tile boundaries for Bay Area planning purposes.
Regional zoning 2018 lookup table for Bay Area with zoning codes, county names, max residential density, and FAR by zoning district.
ACS census tract-level housing structure type data for Bay Area, detailing attached/detached units and owner vs renter occupancy by structure size.
Zoning layer for Bay Area parcels with zoning classification, description, and parcel situs address.
RHNA 2050 draft methodology factors by jurisdiction including transit connectivity, jobs-housing balance, and natural hazard metrics.
Bay Area housing policy data with jurisdictions, policy categories, toolkit standards compliance, and TOC policy details.
Census block-level racial composition data for Bay Area showing multi-race combinations and Hispanic/non-Hispanic population counts.
Regional parcel grid with 4-mile tile boundaries for Bay Area spatial planning.
Bay Area Express Lanes network update data with route geometry, status, operators, and RTP IDs.
ACS county-level education attainment data for Bay Area distinguishing veteran vs non-veteran civilian populations by degree level.
ACS county-level nativity data for children under 6 living with one or two parents in the Bay Area, by child and parent nativity status.
ACS state-level disability data covering male and female populations by age group and disability type including hearing, self-care, and cognitive difficulties.
Transit-oriented community (TOC) policy areas in 2022 for Bay Area, with transit service tier, jurisdiction, county, and status.
ACS state-level disconnected youth data tracking youth not in school and not in labor force by gender and education status.
ACS county-level school enrollment data by grade level and school type (public vs private) for male and female populations.
Transit Priority Areas (TPA) boundaries for Bay Area in 2017 with BRT, ferry, and light rail headway mile designations.
2018 housing affordability indicators by county in the Bay Area including median home value, mortgage payment, and percent of income for housing.
RHNA draft 2019 methodology factors based on jobs (LEHD) including jobs-housing balance, natural hazards, and racial equity divergence.
Zoning district layer for Bay Area parcels with zoning classification, description, address, and approval dates.
Transportation Improvement Program (TIP) project point locations for Bay Area with TIP IDs and PDA/COC designations.
Bay Area jurisdiction centroids for 2020 (no water areas), providing representative points for 109 jurisdictions.
Bay Area Vital Signs targets CMS data updated December 2020 with indicator paths, display status, and min/max chart values.
National Park Service unit boundaries in the Bay Area with names, addresses, phone numbers, and district assignments.
ACS state-level housing structure type data covering mobile homes, multi-unit structures, and renter/owner occupancy.
US Census block group boundaries with 2020 TIGER vintage, including land and water area, state/tract/block group identifiers.
Census block-level geographic and demographic data for Bay Area including housing counts, school districts, voting districts, and land area.
RHNA regional income shift distribution data by jurisdiction and county for housing allocation planning.
Building footprint polygons for Bay Area parcels with APN linkage and modification dates.
ACS state-level heating fuel type data for Bay Area owner-occupied housing, covering utility gas, electricity, fuel oil, wood, and solar heating.
Bay Area bridge inventory with link IDs, locations, SHOPP programming, and construction type.
Urban limit line boundaries for Bay Area jurisdictions, delineating areas inside and outside urban growth limits.
ACS census tract nativity data for Bay Area showing foreign-born population by continent of origin and citizenship status.
Parcel-level data for Bay Area with master plan, legal description, building features (tennis court, dishwasher), and loan amounts.
ACS county-level owner housing cost burden data for Bay Area, showing monthly owner costs as percentage of household income by householder age.
ACS state-level median age data by race and sex for Bay Area, with margins of error for each demographic subgroup.
ACS census tract migration data showing where Bay Area tract residents lived 1 year ago, by state, county, city, and abroad.
Regional county boundary polygons for the Bay Area from MTC GIS database with FIPS codes and area measurements.
ACS county-level median earnings by occupation category for Bay Area, covering office, construction, business, and computer occupations.
Bay Area Vital Signs housing permit data by decade and jurisdiction, showing single-family and multi-family unit production and county.
ACS census tract median earnings by detailed occupation for Bay Area, including transportation, production, sales, and healthcare occupations.
San Mateo County parcel boundaries with primary land use codes and descriptions from the BASIS land use collection.
Ridgeline overlay zone polygons for Bay Area jurisdictions identifying protected ridgeline areas by zone type.
ACS census tract commute mode share data for Bay Area workers, including driving alone, transit, biking, walking, and working from home.
Bay Area growth framework overlay for transit priority areas and priority development areas with acreage and plan status.
ACS state-level limited English proficiency data for Bay Area, showing language spoken at home and English ability by age group.
ACS census tract heating fuel type data for Bay Area occupied housing, covering renter and owner units by fuel source.
Bus stop headways during peak periods for Bay Area transit priority areas, with mean and median headway by stop and route.
Park-and-ride lot locations in the Bay Area from 2007 with city, spaces, lighting, bike facilities, and coordinates.
FEMA flood hazard zone data for Bay Area, including flood zone designations, velocity zones, and DFIRM identifiers.
ACS state-level disability prevalence data for Bay Area by age and sex, with margins of error for each population subgroup.
ACS county-level health insurance coverage rates for Bay Area, broken down by age group, insurance type, and uninsured rates.
ACS state-level homeownership data for Hispanic or Latino households in Bay Area, with renter and owner counts and homeownership rates.
ACS county-level health insurance coverage data for Bay Area by race/ethnicity, reporting uninsured rates for Asian, Pacific Islander, and other populations by age.
Earthquake shaking intensity zones for the Berryessa fault scenario in Bay Area, with Modified Mercalli Intensity (MMI) classifications.
2018 net worth distribution by 2019 census tracts in Bay Area, showing household wealth in ranges from below $50,000 to over $250,000.
ACS state-level median earnings by detailed occupation category for Bay Area full-time workers, including gender-specific occupational earnings.
ACS county-level housing occupancy data for Bay Area with owner/renter rates, vacancy rates, and upper home value quartile.
Areal hydrography polygons for Bay Area from 2020 TIGER data including water body names, land area, and MTFCC codes.
ACS census tract housing vacancy data for Bay Area including vacant unit types, homeowner vacancy rate, and total housing units.
ACS state-level birth rate data for women in Bay Area by age group, showing women who had a birth in the past 12 months.
Earthquake shaking intensity for the central Calaveras fault scenario in Bay Area with MMI classifications and grid codes.
Earthquake liquefaction susceptibility zones for Bay Area based on soil type and USGS data.
ACS county-level disability data for Bay Area by sex and age group including ambulatory, self-care, and hearing difficulties.
ACS county-level housing vacancy data for Bay Area including rented/not occupied, homeowner vacancy rate, and vacant unit types.
ACS state-level veteran population data for Bay Area by age and sex, tracking veteran and non-veteran civilian populations.
Bay Area planned development zoning district data with PD use, density, rezoning file references, and approval dates.
Major passenger railway lines in Bay Area with operator, mode, route name, status, and class.
PBA 2050 Plan Bay Area growth geography boundaries for 2020 with area names, jurisdictions, and designations.
Non-urbanized area boundaries in Bay Area by county, delineating areas outside urban growth limits.
ACS census tract health insurance coverage data for Bay Area by age group, with uninsured rates for different populations.
ACS county-level housing structure type by occupancy in Bay Area, covering single-unit, multi-unit, and mobile homes by tenure.
2018 housing affordability indicators by ZIP code in Bay Area including mortgage payment, home value, affordability index, and owner-occupancy rate.
